steps.name: Create and approve test player via API
Open player context — navigate to login form
Fill new password + submit → verify success
Login with new password → verify player nav
Verify old password rejected (direct API call)
steps.note: Old password login returned HTTP 401 — correctly rejected

steps.name: Verify reset token replay rejected (410)
steps.note: Replay correctly returned 410: Reset link is invalid or expired
